Header.title: Hansal Patel
Header.paragraph: Aspiring Cybersecurity Professional & Computer Engineering Student. Specialized in penetration testing, security tooling, and AI-driven security solutions.

About.paragraph: I am a Computer Engineering student at A.D. Patel Institute of Technology (CPI: 9.03) with a passion for cybersecurity. My experience ranges from building custom security toolkits for Kali Linux to developing AI-enabled interview platforms and travel planners. I focus on vulnerability assessment, network analysis, and secure application development.

Project1.title: Cybersecurity Toolkit for Kali Linux (CyberToolkit)
Project1.description: Built a comprehensive CLI-based penetration testing toolkit covering recon, attack simulation, and data protection. It integrates a Network Scanner, Phishing Tool, URL Inspector, Secure File Sharing, and Wordlist Generator (CUPP). Designed with a modular, menu-driven architecture for streamlined execution on Kali Linux.
Project1.overview: CyberToolkit is a centralized, modular security platform developed in a Linux environment to streamline penetration testing, threat detection, and vulnerability assessments. Written primarily in Python and Bash, the toolkit aggregates critical offensive and defensive utilities into a single, cohesive workflow, enabling security analysts to simulate real-world attacks and audit network defenses efficiently.

capabilities.title: Intelligence & Profiling Engine
capabilities.text: Integrates targeted OSINT and dictionary-generation frameworks (like CUPP) to simulate credential-harvesting vulnerabilities based on custom behavioral profiles.

capabilities.title: Active Defense & Detection
capabilities.text: Features a real-time phishing and URL inspection utility that programmatically evaluates web domains to intercept social engineering vectors.

capabilities.title: Network Auditing & Traffic Analysis
capabilities.text: Equipped with localized packet sniffing (CyberSniffer.py) and protocol-specific utilities (RDP, DDoS simulation scripts) to test infrastructure resilience against traffic inflation and unauthorized access.

capabilities.title: Secure Infrastructure Utilities
capabilities.text: Includes secure file-sharing mechanisms and automation scripts (setup.sh, File_Transfer.sh) to ensure encrypted data movement and rapid environment deployment during field assessments.

DDoS Attack Simulation Utility (Port & Traffic Auditing)
Phishing Detector and Live URL Analysis Engine

Project2.title: AI-Enabled Interview Platform (TalentAI)
Project2.description: Engineered a sophisticated platform for interview preparation and personality analysis using Next.js and the Gemini AI API. Features secure multi-user session management via Firebase and AI-driven API integration for controlled, secure data handling and real-time analysis.
Project2.overview: TalentAI is a state-of-the-art mock interview simulation and personality assessment platform. It leverages Gemini AI to generate customized, role-specific questions and analyze user responses in real-time. By integrating speech-to-text and NLP analysis, it offers actionable feedback on technical accuracy, communication style, and personality alignment, preparing candidates with professional readiness insights.

capabilities.title: Custom AI Question Generator
capabilities.text: Dynamically crafts industry-standard technical and behavioral questions based on resume parsing and targeted job roles.

capabilities.title: Real-Time Sentiment & Speech Analysis
capabilities.text: Analyzes response transcripts for tone, filler word usage, and semantic confidence to score communication performance.

capabilities.title: Interactive Analytics Dashboard
capabilities.text: Visualizes candidate progress over multiple sessions with performance breakdown charts across core competency matrices.

capabilities.title: Secure Session Management
capabilities.text: Powered by Firebase Auth and Firestore to handle user data securely, ensuring privacy-compliant storage of interview transcripts and feedback.

screenshots.caption: AI Mock Interview Setup & Candidate Interface
Real-Time AI Response Scoring & Sentiment Analysis Report
Comprehensive Performance Analytics & Skill Growth Dashboard

Project3.title: AI Travel Planner (VagaWise)
Project3.description: Developed a full-stack AI travel planner that crafts personalized itineraries and budget allocations. Implemented Firebase-backed authentication and secure API communication, integrating third-party APIs with robust input validation to prevent unauthorized access.
Project3.overview: VagaWise is a smart, budget-conscious travel itinerary planner designed to automate trip coordination. Using Gemini AI, it generates complete travel routes, lodging recommendations, and daily activity logs. The system features custom budget allocation algorithms that dynamically calculate cost-of-living adjustments for target destinations, giving users realistic, stress-free travel plans.

capabilities.title: Intelligent Itinerary Builder
capabilities.text: Generates location-aware daily schedules and mapping suggestions using semantic city-by-city route optimization.

capabilities.title: Dynamic Budget Allocation Engine
capabilities.text: Splits trip budgets into hotel, dining, transit, and leisure tiers based on cost-of-living indices and user preference curves.

capabilities.title: Historical Trip Archives & Synchronization
capabilities.text: Synchronizes local storage data with Firestore to persist plans, enabling instant offline access and seamless multi-device updates.

capabilities.title: Secure Third-Party API Integration
capabilities.text: Encapsulates external API endpoints with rate-limiting and validation layers to defend backend integrity.

screenshots.caption: AI Travel Planner Custom Itinerary Setup
Cost-of-Living Aware Budget Tier Allocation Dashboard
Trip History and Offline Storage Management Hub
